STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY HAINES, CHRISTIAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAINES, CHRISTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMBANDRAKE, FRITZ CIRCLE OF LIFE THEATRE $1,175.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER OF EXAMIANTION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
